deviations.description: The updated requirement in Version 2 obligates the process to administer additional anesthesia every 20 minutes for patients with high anesthesia tolerance who received local anesthesia. The process model, as shown in the diagram on page 1, only requires asking the patient about pain every 20 minutes and does not include the repeated administration of additional anesthesia. This results in a direct violation of the new, stricter requirement.
